meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn how to use AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to crush technical debt and ship your MVP faster than ever.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is 'technical friction'—the gap between your vision and the code. By leveraging AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform your codebase into a collaborative partner, automating root-cause analysis and refactoring to maintain velocity and reach market validation efficiently.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the architecture is sound, the landing page is live, but the codebase has become a graveyard of half-baked features and silent bugs. You are trapped in the '90% done' syndrome, where every minor fix triggers a cascade of regressions that kill your momentum and drain your runway. The dream of a scalable SaaS is rapidly turning into a maintenance nightmare.

But the era of manual, line-by-line debugging is dead for the lean founder. By integrating AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code into your workflow, you move from being a bottleneck to an architect. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about shifting your mindset from writing code to orchestrating it, ensuring your MVP reaches the market before your capital—or your passion—runs dry.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Mapping
steps.description: Stop guessing where the error lies. Use AI to ingest your stack traces and identify the precise logic flaw causing your deployment failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the attached stack trace and identify the specific architectural bottleneck causing the runtime error. Provide a concise refactor plan that minimizes side effects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --analyze-logs ./logs/error.log --focus "Identify root cause and propose fix"

steps.title: Dependency Graph Auditing
steps.description: Unfinished projects often collapse due to dependency rot. Use AI to audit your package ecosystem and prune unnecessary weight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my current package.json and identifying redundant dependencies. Suggest a leaner alternative architecture to reduce build times by 20%.

steps.title: Feature Flag Isolation
steps.description: Isolate broken features without rolling back your entire production environment. AI helps you extract logic into modular flags.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current unstable feature into a toggle-able module. Ensure the main application flow remains intact even if this module fails.

steps.title: Automated Regression Suite Generation
steps.description: Never break the same feature twice. Generate high-coverage integration tests based on your current production usage patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase and generate a set of Playwright integration tests covering the critical path for user authentication and payment processing.

steps.title: Performance Optimization Sprint
steps.description: AI-assisted profiling to find bottlenecks in your database queries or API response times that are stalling user adoption.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Profile the current database queries in the user controller. Suggest indexing strategies or caching layers to reduce latency by 50ms.

pro_tips: Treat your AI as a Senior Engineer: Always ask it to explain the 'why' behind a refactor to prevent 'black box' technical debt.
Small Commits, Big Wins: Use AI to break large refactors into atomic commits to ensure you can revert in seconds if a bug persists.
Context is King: Always provide the AI with your project's 'architecture.md' file to ensure it doesn't suggest patterns that violate your design constraints.
The 80/20 Rule: Use AI to automate the 80% of boilerplate debugging so you can focus your human brain on the 20% of core business logic.
CI/CD Integration: Hook your AI debugging commands into your GitHub Actions to automatically suggest fixes on failed PR checks.
content.next_steps: Once your codebase is stabilized, implement a weekly 'AI Audit' session where you feed your backlog into the AI to prioritize the highest-impact features for the next sprint.
content.conversion_block: You are sitting on a goldmine of potential, but code debt is your only enemy. Stop debugging in the dark and start building at the speed of thought. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
